proposal_summary: Deploy Uniswap v3 to Boba Network, an Ethereum L2 scaling solution. The proposal requests a license exemption for Boba Network to use the Uniswap V3 Core software code. Boba Network will provide $1M in BOBA tokens to foster usage via a multisig wallet co-owned by the Uniswap Grants Program and Boba Network.

disclosed_entities.name: Boba Network
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Boba Network and FranklinDAO (Prev. Penn Blockchain) are submitting this proposal to Deploy Uniswap v3 on Boba Network.

disclosed_entities.name: FranklinDAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Boba Network and FranklinDAO (Prev. Penn Blockchain) are submitting this proposal

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Grants Program (UGP)
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The tokens will be sent to a multisig wallet co-owned by the Uniswap Grants Program (UGP) and Boba Network

disclosed_entities.name: DMA Labs
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: In cooperation with DMA Labs (a major contributor to ICHIs Uniswap v3 management protocols)

disclosed_entities.name: multisig wallet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The tokens will be sent to a multisig wallet co-owned by the Uniswap Grants Program (UGP) and Boba Network

claimed_actions.raw_action: Grant an additional use grant to use the Uniswap V3 Core software code
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Boba Network receives license to use the Uniswap Code for a full deployment of the Uniswap Protocol v3 onto the Boba Network L2
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The Boba Network is granted an additional use grant to use the Uniswap V3 Core software code

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Foster the usage of Uniswap v3 on Boba Network by funding incentives
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Boba Network will provide $1M $BOBA tokens to foster the usage of Uniswap v3 on Boba Network. The tokens will be sent to a multisig wallet

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal primarily grants a license exemption for deploying the protocol on a new Layer 2 and arranging an incentive program via a multisig.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: We are requesting an exemption that will allow Boba Network to use the Licensed Work to deploy it on Boba Network... Boba Network will provide $1M $BOBA tokens

limitations: No smart contract code or addresses are provided for the actual deployment or execution.
